MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
COLLEEN BAILEY KELLEY, ESQ., (408)947-2429, FOR Defendants And Cross-Complainants/MOVING PARTIES, Dale And Mei Fode
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE OPPOSING PARTY

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: Defendants And Cross-Complainants Dale And Mei Fode's Motion To Quash Consumer Records Subpoena is granted. The court finds that the subpoena is overly broad and invades the right to privacy without good cause. Defendants' And Cross-Complainants' objections to evidence submitted in support of opposition to the motion to quash is granted. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (EAH/612)
